title: Optimal Control for Quantum Gates
description: Learn numerical optimization techniques for designing high-fidelity quantum gate pulses. Master GRAPE, Krotov, and other algorithms that go beyond analytical pulse design to achieve optimal performance.
learningObjectives: Explain the principles of optimal control theory applied to quantum systems
Implement the GRAPE algorithm for gradient-based pulse optimization
Design cost functions that capture fidelity, leakage, and robustness requirements
Apply constraints for hardware limitations in pulse optimization
Compare analytical and numerical approaches to pulse design
